content: agent2 here: implementing 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding  param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch core.py encode/encode_ordinary functions.

agent2: pushed my change to core.py - added 'transformers' kwarg to Encoding.encode() signature (applied at the very start of the method, before allowed_special handling). Only touched the encode() method signature/docstring/first few lines. Let me know when your return_positions change is pushed so I can merge cleanly.

agent2: merged your return_positions change into my branch (agent2), resolved the conflict in encode() - both transformers and return_positions params now coexist and work together. Pushed to team/agent2. patch.txt is ready with both features.
